channel.title: Книги on Knigozavar
channel.description: Recent content in Книги on Knigozavar

item.title: read so far in 2026
item.author: Змей
item.content:
book author re-read
The Power Fantasy #1-12 Kieron Gillen, Caspar Wijngaard ✔️
Man-Made Wonders of the World -
The Cinnamon Bun Book Store Laurie Gilmore
Why Don’t We Just Kill the Kid In the Omelas Hole Isabel J. Kim
Dante’s Inferno: A Graphic Novel Adaptation Dante Alighieri, Paul Brizzi, Gaétan Brizzi
This Is How You Lose the Time War Max Gladstone, Amal El-Mohtar ✔️
The Murderbot Diaries #3 - Rogue Protocol Martha Wells
The Murderbot Diaries #2 - Artificial Condition Martha Wells
The Murderbot Diaries #1 - All Systems Red Martha Wells
Underland Chronicles #1 - Gregor the Overlander Suzanne Collins
Katabasis R.F. Kuang
We Only Find Them When They’re Dead #1-5 Al Ewing, Simone Di Meo, Al Ewing
Before the Coffee Gets Cold Toshikazu Kawaguchi
The River Has Roots Amal El-Mohtar ✔️
Icarus K. Ancrum
Middlegame Seanan McGuire ✔️

reading of nominated for Hugo Award for 2026 - in progress
